calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted there are no appearances, that it instructed parties to file a petition for change of venue during the last hearing, and no petition has been filed. The Petition for Instructions is Off Calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Continued To May-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Continued To Apr-23-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Martin Behn for and with Bertram Thomas (Petitioner)

Mr. Behn argued that the property is located in San Francisco and being managed in
San Francisco. The Court made reference to language in the declaration regarding the physical location used by the Trustee in Oakland, CA., stated that the matter needs to be moved to Alameda County and that a petition for change of venue is needed. The Petition for Instructions is continued to April 23, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on filing of a petition for change of venue.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Continued To Mar-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
